description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image, with three stages: unit_testing, build, and npm_publish, and a global before_script that exports NPM_API_KEY and writes it to ~/.npmrc for npm authentication. In the unit_testing stage add a unit_testing job that runs npm install then npm test, stores the node_modules/ directory as an artifact that expires in one week and is kept on success. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm run build, stores the dist/ directory as an artifact with the same expiration and success condition. In the npm_publish stage add an npm_publish job that runs npm publish, is manual, and uses the same node:latest image.
